title: Internet vs Website
drDigitalIntro: The internet is a giant network connecting computers all over the world. Think of it like a highway system — the internet is the highways. A website is one location on the internet, like a store on that highway. Google, Facebook, YouTube — those are all websites. They live on the internet. You use the internet to reach websites.

options.text: The Safari app on your Mac

drDigitalSuccess: Exactly! The internet is the global network — websites are individual places you visit on that network.
drDigitalHint: Think of the highway vs. the stores on the highway.
